title: Add listBranches() to GitHub API helper
summary: Implemented listBranches() function to fetch all branches from a GitHub repository, returning sorted branch names. Function uses Octokit's repos.listBranches API with per_page=100 pagination.
business_context: Task 2 of the GitHub API helper enhancement. The function is needed by an upcoming API route (Task 3) that will list all branches in a project's repository.
affected_users: Backend API route consumers; internal use for branch listing
acceptance_criteria: listBranches() exports as async function accepting owner and repo params
Returns sorted array of branch name strings
TypeScript types are correct and compile without errors
